privileged_info_summary: The task requires adding Espresso UI tests to a TipCalculatorApp Android project. The project directory is /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/TipCalculatorApp with a test file expected at app/src/androidTest/java/com/example/tipcalculator/MainActivityEspressoTest.kt. The UI layout contains seven view IDs: cost_of_service (TextInputEditText), calculate_button (Button), tip_result (TextView), round_up_switch (SwitchMaterial), option_twenty_percent (RadioButton), option_eighteen_percent (RadioButton), and option_fifteen_percent (RadioButton)—all confirmed present in the generated activity_main.xml. The project is entirely synthetic, generated by the setup script with no external data sources.
